Phase 4 user-ux pass: LOOP WORKS (Fabio ran it - app gen queued, coexisted with a PromptBox t2i, landed as gallery card). Fixed 2 bugs found: (1) queue card read UNIVERSAL WORKFLOW/APPIMAGEREGEN - generationService._buildDisplay now resolves config.appId->getAppById().title into modelName + new appTitle field (threaded to _queueSnapshotItem); MpiQueuePanel shows just appTitle for app jobs. (2) status bar collapsed to top of App overlay - main-area stash removes info-bar flow siblings so its sticky-bottom rect started at top; MpiOverlay now toggles .main-area.mpi-main-area--app-overlay on show/hide, CSS pins #shell-info-bar absolute bottom:0 (z10015) while open. Both linted+headless-verified (class/position flip). PENDING user-ux: confirm statusbar at bottom + queue label reads Image Regen. App UI polish deferred to a design pass after the plan.

Status-bar bug REAL fix (first attempt was a band-aid, removed). Root: MpiOverlay main-area stash APPENDED _stash after the spared #shell-info-bar, flipping it from last child to first (and restore re-appended after it too) -> permanent .main-area DOM-order corruption every open/close -> sticky bottom:0 info-bar collapsed to top, persisted after close. Latent PRIMITIVE bug (MpiBaseApp correctly uses MpiOverlay via mountTarget:main-area+appendToContainer, same as MpiModelManager); main-area is just first mode to spare a sticky;bottom:0 sibling. Fix: _doShow insertBefore(_stash, firstChild) not append; hide insertBefore(child,_stash) not append -> spared siblings keep position, order preserved, no CSS. Band-aid class+CSS deleted. Verified: .main-area child order identical before/after open->close AND after 2nd cycle (idempotent); info-bar stays last->sticky pins bottom; 0 errors. Queue label already confirmed reads IMAGE REGEN. PENDING user-ux: statusbar bottom while-open AND after-close.

Phase 5 DONE + verified (headless). Reuse routing for app cards. Shared helper openAppFromReuse(item) in appService.js: appId->getAppById; unknown->false (normal reuse); missing model->ui:warning+apps:open+true; else seed s_appInputs[appId]=appInputs (before emit) + app:open + true. Called at TOP of _applyPromptReuse in BOTH blocks (Gallery :1090, History :948) above _pb guard AND History cross-mediaType reject. itemHasReusablePrompt += ||item.appId so button renders on app cards. Verified: available app seeds+opens, normal card returns false+no events, missing-model routes to library, full loop restores prompt+source-image on remount. 0 errors. PENDING user-ux: Reuse on real app card (survives restart via sidecar); normal-card reuse unchanged; uninstalled-model app routes to library. Next: Phase 6 docs+rules (ASK USER first - Documentation Drift).

Phase 5 user-ux pass: 3 gaps fixed. (1) No in-progress/latent card - submitAppGeneration now passes placeholderGroup (source img as inputPreview, isGenerating) + tempId, mirrors mkPlaceholder; gallery renders it off activeGenerations, no block change. (2) Reuse restored inputs but app did not visibly open - reuse popup teardown fires bare ui:close-all-popups after openAppFromReuse, MpiOverlay hid the just-opened app; fix = emit app:open on next tick (setTimeout 0); verified headless with exact repro. (3) Result only in gallery - MpiBaseApp now has a result pane, onComplete({item}) shows produced image in-app via resolveMediaUrl (still lands as gallery card too). All linted+headless-verified, 0 errors. KNOWN LIMIT: reuse app-to-app routing needs a 2nd app to fully test (deferred). PENDING user-ux: latent card shows during app gen; reuse opens app to front; result appears in-app.

Reuse regression fixed: fresh app cards did not reopen on Reuse (old/reloaded ones did). ROOT (found by reading real sidecars - data was FINE, appId present): generationService wrote appId to the SIDECAR (~:988) but NOT to the live in-memory builtItems[0] (baseProps ~:1005 -> createImageItem). So live Reuse read payload.item.appId=undefined -> openAppFromReuse false -> PromptBox fallback. Reload hydrated appId from sidecar (reconciler :66) so old cards worked. Fix: add appId+appInputs to baseProps (createImageItem already declares both + spreads overrides). Linted. Also confirmed: squirrel sidecars carry appId:image-regen+appInputs. DEFERRED (user nice-to-have): in-app latents during gen - gallery card already shows them; per-job generation:preview needs regId the enqueue path does not return; folded into deferred App-design pass. PENDING user-ux: fresh app card reopens on Reuse.

In-app latents BUILT (user: needed - app overlay hides the gallery card, so the latent must show IN the app). Assessed as isolated additive wiring, no end-of-plan risk. submitAppGeneration returns {...enqueueResult, tempId} (already made placeholder tempId). MpiBaseApp captures _myTempId on Run, subscribes generation:preview {id,url}, matches via activeGenerations.get(id).tempId===_myTempId, paints latent into the same result pane (_paintResult); final replaces it on complete; cleared on complete/error/cancel/new-run. Verified headless: get().tempId lookup works, non-matching preview does NOT paint (guard - concurrent gallery gen wont leak), 0 errors. PENDING user-ux: watch latent animate in the App result pane on a real gen. Reuse-on-fresh-card confirmed working by user.
